Contact Nonstop Lock & Key

Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year. Reach out for a free quote or emergency locksmith service in St. Louis and surrounding areas.

Hours

24/7/365
Always Available

Send Us a Message

For emergencies, call us directly at (314) 532-1112 for fastest response.

Why Contact Us

We make it easy to get the locksmith help you need

Free Quotes

Upfront pricing with no surprises. Get a free estimate before any work begins.

Fast Response

20-30 minute average response time. We get to you quickly when you need us most.

No Hidden Fees

The price we quote is the price you pay. Transparent, honest service every time.

Popular Services

Explore our most requested locksmith services

Car Lockout Service

Locked out of your car? Our mobile locksmiths arrive fast to safely unlock your vehicle without damage.

Learn more

House Lockout Service

Locked out of your home? We use non-destructive methods to get you back inside fast, day or night.

Learn more

Commercial Lockout Service

Locked out of your business? We get you back inside fast with no damage to your storefront, office, or commercial door.

Learn more

24 Hour Emergency Locksmith

Urgent lock or key emergency? Our 24/7 mobile locksmiths respond fast across the entire St. Louis area.

Learn more

Broken Key Extraction

Key snapped off in your lock? We extract broken keys and cut replacements on the spot.

Learn more

Lock Rekey Service

Change who has access to your home without replacing your locks. Rekeying is fast, affordable, and effective.

Learn more

Need a Locksmith Right Now?

Don't wait. Call us for immediate 24/7 locksmith service in St. Louis and surrounding areas.

Call (314) 532-1112

Nonstop Lock & Key

Your trusted 24/7 locksmith service in St. Louis, MO. Fast, reliable, and professional locksmith solutions for residential, commercial, and automotive security needs.
